selectionPurpose: Select the best NOD user-input page and related validation/error states for Glen to test how validation rules are added into a TaPaaS config file.

doNotOverclaim: Do not claim these are confirmed TaPaaS pages.

Do not claim TaPaaS schema compatibility.
